metadata.name: staramr
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Scans genome contigs against ResFinder, PlasmidFinder, and PointFinder databases

variables.name: staramr.blast.resfinder.ResfinderBlastDatabase.logger
documentation: A Class for pulling information from the ResFinder database.

methods.name: staramr.blast.resfinder.ResfinderBlastDatabase.ResfinderBlastDatabase.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new ResfinderBlastDatabase.
\:param database_dir: The specific ResFinder database (drug class) directory.

methods.name: staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase.AbstractBlastDatabase.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new AbstractBlastDatabase
\:param database_dir: The directory containing the database files.

methods.name: staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase.AbstractBlastDatabase.get_database_names
documentation:
Get the names of the databases (fasta files) used for BLAST.
\:return: The names of the databases.

methods.name: staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase.AbstractBlastDatabase.get_path
documentation:
Gets the path to a particular database with the given name.
\:param database_name: The name of the database.
\:return: The path to the database (fasta) file.

methods.name: staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase.AbstractBlastDatabase.get_name
documentation:
Gets a name for this blast database implementation.
\:return: A name for this implementation.

methods.name: staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase.AbstractBlastDatabase.get_database_paths
documentation:
Gets a list of all database paths.
\:return: A list of all database (fasta file) paths.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new PointfinderDatabaseInfo.
\:param database_info_dataframe: A pd.DataFrame containing the information in PointFinder.
\:param file: The file where the pointfinder database info originates from.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.from_file
documentation:
Builds a new PointfinderDatabaseInfo from the passed file containing PointFinder information on drug resistance
mutations.
\:param file: The file containing drug resistance mutations.
\:return: A new PointfinderDatabaseInfo.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.from_pandas_table
documentation:
Builds a new PointfinderDatabaseInfo from the passed pd.DataFrame.
\:param database_info_dataframe: A pd.DataFrame containing the information in PointFinder.
\:return: A new PointfinderDatabaseInfo.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.PointfinderDatabaseInfo._resistance_table_hacks
documentation:
A function implementing some hacks to try and fix mismatched strings in the pointfinder databases.
These should be removed when the underlying database is corrected.
\:param table: The pointfinder resistance table to fix.
\:return: None, but modifies the passed table in place.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.get_resistance_codons
documentation:
Gets a list of resistance codons from the given gene and codon mutations.
\:param gene: The gene.
\:param codon_mutations: The codon mutations.
\:return: The resistance codons.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.get_resistance_nucleotides
documentation:
Gets a list of resistance nucleotides from the given gene and nucleotide mutations.
\:param gene: The gene.
\:param nucleotide_mutations: The nucleotide mutations.
\:return: The resistance nucleotides.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.PointfinderDatabaseInfo.get_value
documentation:
Gets the phenotype associated with a particular mutation from the Pointfinder Database table.

```
param gene

The gene.

param mutation

The mutation.

param attribute

The attribute to get (ex: "Resistance", "PMID", etc.)

return

A string containing the attribute for the passed gene and
mutation, if it exists, or the empty string ("") if the
attribute is missing.
```

variables.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.PointfinderHitHSP.logger
documentation: Class storing a PointFinder BLAST hit/hsp.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.PointfinderHitHSP.PointfinderHitHSP.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new PointfinderHitHSP.
\:param file: The input file.
\:param blast_record: The Bio.Blast.Record this hit came from.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.PointfinderHitHSP.PointfinderHitHSP.get_amr_gene_name
documentation:
Gets the particular gene name for the PointFinder hit.
\:return: The gene name.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.PointfinderHitHSP.PointfinderHitHSP.get_mutations
documentation:
Gets a list of NucleotideMutationPosition for the individual mutations.
\:return: A list of NucleotideMutationPosition.

classes.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.nucleotide.PointfinderHitHSPPromoter.PointfinderHitHSPPromoter

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.nucleotide.PointfinderHitHSPPromoter.PointfinderHitHSPPromoter.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new PointfinderHitHSPPromoter from a promoter-related BLAST hit.
\:param file: The input file.
\:param blast_record: The Bio.Blast.Record this hit came from.
\:param database_name: The name of the BLAST database. This name must be named in the same way the

> Pointfinder promoters are named (ex: "embA_promoter_size_115bp").

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.nucleotide.PointfinderHitHSPPromoter.PointfinderHitHSPPromoter._parse_database_name
documentation:
Parses the name of the database in order to obtain the promoter offset.
The database name is expected to have the following format:

[GENENAME]-promoter-size-[SIZE]bp

example:

embA-promoter-size-115bp

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.nucleotide.PointfinderHitHSPPromoter.PointfinderHitHSPPromoter.get_amr_gene_name
documentation:
Gets the particular gene name for the PointfinderHitHSPPromoter hit.
\:return: The gene name.
This class represents a Pointfinder BLAST hit and is responsible for parsing the related BLAST hit.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.nucleotide.PointfinderHitHSPRNA.PointfinderHitHSPRNA.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new PointfinderHitHSPRNA.
\:param file: The input file.
\:param blast_record: The Bio.Blast.Record this hit came from.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.nucleotide.PointfinderHitHSPRNA.PointfinderHitHSPRNA.get_amr_gene_name
documentation:
Gets the particular gene name for the PointfinderHitHSPRNA hit.
\:return: The gene name.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new PointfinderBlastDatabase.
\:param database_dir: The root directory for the PointFinder organisms.
\:param organism: The particular organism.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.is_validated
documentation:
Whether or not this particular PointFinder organism is part of the validated set.
\:return: True if this PointFinder organism/database is validated, False otherwise.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_resistance_codons
documentation:
Gets a list of resistance codons from the given gene and codon mutations.
\:param gene: The gene.
\:param codon_mutations: The codon mutations.
\:return: The resistance codons.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_resistance_nucleotides
documentation:
Gets a list of resistance nucleotides from the given gene and nucleotide mutations.
\:param gene: The gene.
\:param nucleotide_mutations: The nucleotide mutations.
\:return: The resistance nucleotides.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_resistance_promoter
documentation:
Gets a list of resistance nucleotides and codons located within the promoter, derived from the list
of nucleotide mutations.
\:param gene: The name of the gene.
\:param nucleotide_mutations: The positions of the nucleotide mutations.
\:return: The resistance positions (both nucleotide and codon positions).

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_organism
documentation:
Gets the particular organism of this database.
\:return: The organism.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_cge_notes
documentation:
Gets the note associated with a particular mutation from the Pointfinder Database table.

```
param gene

The gene.

param mutation

The mutation.

return

A string containing the note, if it exists.
```

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_cge_phenotype
documentation:
Gets the phenotype associated with a particular mutation from the Pointfinder Database table.

```
param gene

The gene.

param mutation

The mutation.

return

A string containing the phenotype, if it exists.
```

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_cge_pmid
documentation:
Gets the PMID associated with a particular mutation from the Pointfinder Database table.

```
param gene

The gene.

param mutation

The mutation.

return

A string (not integer) containing the PMID, if it exists.
```

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_cge_required_mutation
documentation:
Gets the required mutation associated with a particular mutation from
the Pointfinder Database table.

```
param gene

The gene.

param mutation

The mutation.

return

A string containing the required mutation, if it exists.
```

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_cge_mechanism
documentation:
Gets the mechanism associated with a particular mutation from the
Pointfinder Database table.

```
param gene

The gene.

param mutation

The mutation.

return

A string containing the mechanism, if it exists.
```

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_available_organisms
documentation:
A Class Method to get a list of organisms that are currently supported by staramr.
\:return: The list of organisms currently supported by staramr.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.get_organisms
documentation:
A Class Method to get the list of organisms from the PointFinder database root directory.
\:param database_dir: The PointFinder database root directory.
\:return: A list of organisms.

methods.name: staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase.PointfinderBlastDatabase.build_databases
documentation:
A Class Method to build a list of PointfinderBlastDatabase for all organisms in PointFinder.
\:param database_dir: The root PointFinder database directory.
\:return: A list of PointfinderBlastDatabase objects for all organisms in PointFinder.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.nucleotide.NucleotideMutationPosition.NucleotideMutationPosition.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new NucleotideMutationPosition.
\:param match_position: The particular position (0-based index) of the BLAST match string for this mutation.
\:param database_amr_gene_string: The amr gene string.
\:param input_genome_string: The input genome string.
\:param database_amr_gene_start: The start coordinates of the BLAST database hit.
\:param offset: The amount to offset the mutation by (particularly for negative-coordinate promoter mutations).

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.codon.CodonInsertionPosition.CodonInsertionPosition.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new CodonMutationPosition.
\:param match_position: The particular position (0-based index) of the BLAST match string for this mutation.
\:param database_amr_gene_string: The database amr gene string from BLAST.
\:param input_genome_blast_string: The genome BLAST string from the input genome.
\:param database_amr_gene_start: The start coordinates of the BLAST amr gene hit.
\:param offset: The amount to offset the mutation by (important for promoter mutations).

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.BlastResultsParserPointfinderResistance.BlastResultsParserPointfinderResistance.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new BlastResultsParserPointfinderResistance.
\:param file_blast_map: A map/dictionary linking input files to BLAST results files.
\:param arg_drug_table: A table mapping the resistance gene to a specific drug resistance.
\:param blast_database: The particular staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase to use.
\:param pid_threshold: A percent identity threshold for BLAST results.
\:param plength_threshold: A percent length threshold for results.
\:param report_all: Whether or not to report all blast hits.
\:param output_dir: The directory where output files are being written.
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.
\:param complex_mutations: An object mapping a set of multiple point mutations to a single phenotype.

variables.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.BlastResultsParserPointfinder.logger
documentation: A Class for parsing BLAST results specific to PointFinder.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.BlastResultsParserPointfinder.BlastResultsParserPointfinder.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new BlastResultsParserPointfinder.
\:param file_blast_map: A map/dictionary linking input files to BLAST results files.
\:param blast_database: The particular staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase to use.
\:param pid_threshold: A percent identity threshold for BLAST results.
\:param plength_threshold: A percent length threshold for results.
\:param report_all: Whether or not to report all blast hits.
\:param output_dir: The directory where output files are being written.
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.codon.CodonMutationPosition.CodonMutationPosition.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new CodonMutationPosition.
\:param match_position: The particular position (0-based index) of the BLAST match string for this mutation.
\:param database_amr_gene_string: The database amr gene string from BLAST.
\:param input_genome_blast_string: The genome BLAST string from the input genome.
\:param database_amr_gene_start: The start coordinates of the BLAST amr gene hit.
\:param offset: The amount to offset the mutation by (important for promoter mutations).

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.codon.CodonMutationPosition.CodonMutationPosition.get_codon_start
documentation:
Gets the codon start for PointFinder (1-based).
\:return: The codon start.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.codon.CodonMutationPosition.CodonMutationPosition.get_database_amr_gene_codon
documentation:
Gets the particular codon from the amr gene.
\:return: The codon.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.codon.CodonMutationPosition.CodonMutationPosition.get_database_amr_gene_amino_acid
documentation:
Gets the corresponding amino acid from the amr gene. If there is an insertion, returns 'ins'.
\:return: The amino acid from the amr gene.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.codon.CodonMutationPosition.CodonMutationPosition.get_input_genome_amino_acid
documentation:
Gets the corresponding amino acid from the genome. If there is a deletion returns 'del'.
\:return: The amino acid from the genome.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.codon.CodonMutationPosition.CodonMutationPosition.get_input_genome_codon
documentation:
Gets the codon from the input genome.
\:return: The codon from the input genome.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.MutationPosition.MutationPosition.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new MutationPosition.
\:param match_position: The particular position (0-based index) of the BLAST match string for this mutation.
\:param database_amr_gene_start: The start coordinates of the amr gene from the BLAST hit.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.MutationPosition.MutationPosition.get_nucleotide_position
documentation:
Gets the nucleotide position in the amr gene (1-based coords).
\:return: The nucleotide position.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.MutationPosition.MutationPosition.get_type
documentation:
Gets the type of this mutation.
\:return: The type of this mutation.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.MutationPosition.MutationPosition.get_mutation_position
documentation:
Gets the position of this mutation.
\:return: The position of this mutation.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.MutationPosition.MutationPosition.get_database_amr_gene_mutation
documentation:
Gets the database amr gene characters corresponding to the mutation.
\:return: The database amr gene characters.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.MutationPosition.MutationPosition.get_input_genome_mutation
documentation:
Gets the input genome characters corresponding to the mutation.
\:return: The input genome characters.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.pointfinder.MutationPosition.MutationPosition.get_mutation_string
documentation:
Gets the mutation as a string.
\:return: The mutation as a string.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.resfinder.BlastResultsParserResfinder.BlastResultsParserResfinder.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new BlastResultsParserResfinder.
\:param file_blast_map: A map/dictionary linking input files to BLAST results files.
\:param blast_database: The particular staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase to use.
\:param pid_threshold: A percent identity threshold for BLAST results.
\:param plength_threshold: A percent length threshold for results.
\:param report_all: Whether or not to report all blast hits.
\:param output_dir: The directory where output files are being written.
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.

documentation:
Builds a new ResfinderHitHSP.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.resfinder.ResfinderHitHSP.ResfinderHitHSP.get_amr_gene_name
documentation:
Gets the gene name for the ResFinder hit.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.resfinder.ResfinderHitHSP.ResfinderHitHSP.get_amr_gene_name_with_variant
documentation:
Gets the gene name + variant number for the ResFinder hit.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.resfinder.ResfinderHitHSP.ResfinderHitHSP.get_amr_gene_variant_accession
documentation:
Gets the gene name + variant number + accession for the ResFinder hit.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.resfinder.ResfinderHitHSP.ResfinderHitHSP.get_amr_gene_accession
documentation:
Gets the accession for the ResFinder hit.
\:return: The accession.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.resfinder.BlastResultsParserResfinderResistance.BlastResultsParserResfinderResistance.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new BlastResultsParserResfinderResistance.
\:param file_blast_map: A map/dictionary linking input files to BLAST results files.
\:param arg_drug_table: A table mapping the resistance gene to a specific drug resistance.

\:param blast_database: The particular staramr.blast.AbstractBlastDatabase to use.
\:param pid_threshold: A percent identity threshold for BLAST results.
\:param plength_threshold: A percent length threshold for results.
\:param report_all: Whether or not to report all blast hits.
\:param output_dir: The directory where output files are being written.
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.plasmidfinder.BlastResultsParserPlasmidfinder.BlastResultsParserPlasmidfinder.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new BlastResultsParserPlasmidfinder.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.BlastHitPartitions.BlastHitPartitions.__init__
documentation: Creates a new object to store BLAST hit partitions.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.BlastHitPartitions.BlastHitPartitions.append
documentation:
Adds a new blast hit to the set of partitions.
\:param hit: The hit to add.
\:return: None

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.BlastHitPartitions.BlastHitPartitions.get_hits_nonoverlapping_regions
documentation:
Gets BLAST hits divided up into separate lists for non-overlapping regions..
\:return: A list of BLAST hits divided up into non-overlapping regions.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.BlastHitPartitions.BlastHitPartitions._stranded_ends
documentation:
Gets the start/end coordinates, taking into account the strand.
\:param hit: The hit.
\:return: The (start,end) as a tuple.

variables.name: staramr.blast.results.BlastResultsParser.logger
documentation: Class for parsing BLAST results.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.BlastResultsParser.BlastResultsParser.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new class for parsing BLAST results.
\:param file_blast_map: A map/dictionary linking input files to BLAST results files.

\:param pid_threshold: A percent identity threshold for BLAST results.
\:param plength_threshold: A percent length threshold for results.
\:param report_all: Whether or not to report all blast hits.
\:param output_dir: The directory where output files are being written.
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.BlastResultsParser.BlastResultsParser.parse_results
documentation:
Parses the BLAST files passed to this particular object.
\:return: A pd.DataFrame containing the AMR matches from BLAST.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.BlastResultsParser.BlastResultsParser._get_out_file_name
documentation:
Gets hits output file name given input file.
\:param in_file: The input file name.
\:return: The output file name.

variables.name: staramr.blast.plasmidfinder.PlasmidfinderBlastDatabase.logger
documentation: A Class for pulling information from the PlasmidFinder database.

documentation:
Creates a new PlasmidfinderBlastDatabase.

documentation:
A Class Method to get a list of plasmidfinder databases that are currently supported by staramr.
\:return: The list of database_type currently supported by staramr.

methods.name: staramr.blast.plasmidfinder.PlasmidfinderBlastDatabase.PlasmidfinderBlastDatabase.get_config_table
documentation:
A Class Method to get the config table from the plasmidfinder database root directory.
\:return: A DataFrame containing the config table.

documentation:
A Class Method to get the list of databases from the PlasmidFinder database root directory.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.AMRHitHSP.AMRHitHSP.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new AMRHitHSP.
\:param file: The particular file this BLAST hit came from.
\:param blast_record: The Bio.Blast.Record this hit came from.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.AMRHitHSP.AMRHitHSP.get_amr_gene_length
documentation:
Gets the amr gene length.
\:return: The amr gene length.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.AMRHitHSP.AMRHitHSP.get_hsp_length
documentation:
Gets the BLAST HSP length.
\:return: The BLAST HSP length.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.AMRHitHSP.AMRHitHSP.get_pid
documentation:
Gets the percent identity of the HSP.
\:return: The HSP percent identity.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.AMRHitHSP.AMRHitHSP.get_plength
documentation:
Gets the percent length of the HSP to the AMR gene.

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.AMRHitHSP.AMRHitHSP.get_amr_gene_name

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.AMRHitHSP.AMRHitHSP.get_file

methods.name: staramr.blast.results.AMRHitHSP.AMRHitHSP.get_genome_contig_id

variables.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.logger

methods.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.JobHandler.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new JobHandler.
\:param blast_database_objects_map: A map containing the blast databases.
\:param threads: The maximum number of threads to use, where one BLAST process gets assigned to one thread.
\:param output_directory: The output directory to store BLAST results.

methods.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.JobHandler.reset
documentation:
Resets this JobHandler.
\:return: None

methods.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.JobHandler.run_blasts_mlst
documentation:
Scans all files with BLAST against the ResFinder/PointFinder/Plasmid databases and scans all files with MLST
\:param files: The files to scan.
\:param mlst_scheme: Specifies scheme name for MLST to use.
\:return: None

methods.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.JobHandler.is_pointfinder_configured
documentation:
Whether or not PointFinder is being used.
\:return: True if PointFinder is being used, False otherwise.

methods.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.JobHandler.get_resfinder_outputs
documentation:
Gets the ResFinder output files in the form of a dictionary which looks like:

: { 'input_file_name' => 'blast_results_file.xml' }

```
return

A dictionary mapping input file names to ResFinder BLAST output files.
```

methods.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.JobHandler.get_plasmidfinder_outputs
documentation:
Gets the PlasmidFinder output files in the form of a dictionary which looks like:

: { 'input_file_name' => 'blast_results_file.xml' }

```
return

A dictionary mapping input file names to ResFinder BLAST output files.
```

methods.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.JobHandler.get_mlst_outputs
documentation:
Gets the MLST output files from the MLST subprocess
:return A decoded parsed list that contains all of the found locus in each file

methods.name: staramr.blast.JobHandler.JobHandler.get_pointfinder_outputs
documentation:
Gets the PointFinder output files in the form of a dictionary which looks like:

: { 'input_file_name' => 'blast_results_file.xml' }

```
return

A dictionary mapping input file names to PointFinder BLAST output files.
```

Builds a SubCommand for interacting with databases.

Creates a SubCommand for building a new database.

Creates a SubCommand for updating an existing database.

Creates a SubCommand for restoring to the default database.

Confirms with the user whether or not to restore the database directory.

Whether or not to print a help statement when handling this exception.

methods.name: staramr.results.AMRDetectionSummaryResistance.AMRDetectionSummaryResistance.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new AMRDetectionSummaryResistance.
\:param files: The list of genome files we have scanned against.
\:param resfinder_dataframe: The pd.DataFrame containing the ResFinder results.
\:param quality_module_dataframe: The pd.DataFrame containing the genome size, N50 value, number of contigs under our user defined minimum length
as well as the results of our quality metrics (pass or fail) and the corresponding feedback
\:param pointfinder_dataframe: The pd.DataFrame containing the PointFinder results.
\:param plasmidfinder_dataframe: The pd.DataFrame containing the PlasmidFinder results.

variables.name: staramr.subcommand.Search.logger
documentation: Class for searching for AMR resistance genes.

methods.name: staramr.subcommand.Search.Search.__init__
documentation:
Creates a new Search sub-command instance.
\:param subparser: The subparser to use. Generated from argparse.ArgumentParser.add_subparsers().
\:param script_name: The name of the script being run.
\:param version: The version of this software.

methods.name: staramr.subcommand.Search.Search._resize_columns
documentation:
Resizes columns in workbook.
\:param sheetname_dataframe: A map mapping the sheet name to a dataframe.
\:param writer: The ExcelWriter, which the worksheets already added using writer.to_excel
\:param max_width: The maximum width of the columns.
\:param text_wrap: Whether or not to turn on text wrapping if columns surpass max_width.
\:return: None

methods.name: staramr.subcommand.Search.Search._get_col_widths
documentation:
Calculate column widths based on column headers and contents
\:param df: The dataframe.
\:return: A generator giving the max width for each column.

methods.name: staramr.subcommand.Search.Search._generate_results
documentation:
Runs AMR detection and generates results.
\:param database_repos: The database repos object.
\:param resfinder_database: The resfinder database.
\:param pointfinder_database: The pointfinder database.
\:param plasmidfinder_database: The plasmidfinder database.
\:param nprocs: The number of processing cores to use for BLAST.
\:param include_negatives: Whether or not to include negative results in output.
\:param include_resistances: Whether or not to include resistance phenotypes in output.
\:param hits_output: Output directory for hit files.
\:param pid_threshold: The pid threshold.
\:param plength_threshold_resfinder: The plength threshold for resfinder.
\:param plength_threshold_pointfinder: The plength threshold for pointfinder.
\:param plength_threshold_plasmidfinder: The plength threshold for plasmidfinder.
\:param report_all_blast: Whether or not to report all BLAST results.
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.
\:param complex_mutations: An object mapping a set of multiple point mutations to a single phenotype.
\:param files: The list of files to scan.
\:param ignore_invalid_files: Skips over invalid input files.
\:param mlst_scheme: Specifys scheme name MLST uses.
\:return: A dictionary containing the results as dict['results'] and settings as dict['settings'].

variables.name: staramr.results.QualityModule.logger
documentation: Summarizes the quality metric feedback into a single table.

methods.name: staramr.results.QualityModule.QualityModule.__init__
documentation:
Constructs an object for summarizing our quality module.
\:param files: The list of genome files we have scanned against.
\:param genome_size_lower_bound: The lower bound for the genome size as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param genome_size_upper_bound: The upper bound for the genome size as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param minimum_N50_value: The minimum N50 value as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param minimum_contig_length: The minimum contig length as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param unacceptable_num_contigs: The number of contigs in a file, equal to or above our minimum contig length, for which to raise a flag as defined by the user for quality metrics

methods.name: staramr.results.QualityModule.QualityModule.create_quality_module_dataframe
documentation:
Goes through the files and creates a dataframe consisting of the file's genome length, N50 value and the number of contigs greater or equal to the minimum contig length as
specified by the quality metrics. It also consists of the feedback for whether or not the file passed the quality metrics and if it didn't feedback on why it failed
\:return: A pd.dataframe containing the genome size, N50 value, number of contigs equal to or above our user defined minimum contig length
as well as the results of our quality metrics (pass or fail) and the corresponding feedback

methods.name: staramr.results.QualityModule.QualityModule._get_files_contigs_and_genomes_lengths
documentation:
Goes through the files and determines their genome length as well as the length of each contig
\:param files: The files for which we wish to determine the genome length as well as the length of each contig
\:return: An array where the first element is itself an array where each element represents the corresponding
file and is itself an array where each element is the length for the corresponding contig inside of this file.
The second element is itself an array where each element is the genome length for the corresponding file

methods.name: staramr.results.QualityModule.QualityModule._get_genome_length_feedback
documentation:
Goes through the files and determines whether or not they pass the quality metrics for genome length
\:param files_genome_lengths: An array where each element is the genome length of the corresponding file
\:param lb_gsize: The lower bound for the genome size as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param ub_gsize: The upper bound for the genome size as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:return: An array where each element corresponds to the feedback (true or false) for the corresponding file in regards to the
genome size quality metric

methods.name: staramr.results.QualityModule.QualityModule._get_N50_feedback
documentation:
Goes through the files and determines whether or not they pass the quality metrics for N50 value
\:param files_contigs_lengths: The lengths of the contigs for the files
\:param files_genome_lengths: An array where each element is the genome length of the corresponding file
\:param minimum_N50_value: The minimum N50 value as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:return: An array where the first element is itself an array where each element is the N50 value for
the corresponding file. The second element is itself an array where each element is the feedback (true or false)
for whether the corresponding file passes the N50 quality metrics

methods.name: staramr.results.QualityModule.QualityModule._get_num_contigs_over_minimum_bp_feedback
documentation:
Goes through the files and determines whether or not they pass the quality metrics for the acceptable number of contigs equal to or above the minimum contig length
\:param files_contigs_lengths: The lengths of the contigs for the files
\:param minimum_contig_length: The minimum contig length as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param unacceptable_num_contigs: The number of contigs in a file, equal to or above our minimum contig length, for which to raise a flag as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:return: An array where the first element is itself an array where each element is the number of contigs equal to or above the minimum contig length for
the corresponding file. The second element is itself an array where each element is the feedback (True or False)
for whether the corresponding file passes the acceptable number of contigs equal to or above the minimum contig length quality metric

methods.name: staramr.results.QualityModule.QualityModule._get_quality_module
documentation:
Goes through the files and for each provides detailed feedback for why they failed the quality metrics
\:param genome_length_feedback: An array where each element is the feedback (true or false) for the corresponding file in regards to the
genome length quality metric
\:param N50_feedback: An array where each element is the feedback (true or false) for the corresponding file in regards to the
the N50 quality metric
\:param contigs_over_minimum_bp_feedback: An array where each element is the feedback (true or false) for the corresponding file in regards to the
the acceptable number of contigs equal to or above the minimum contig length quality metric
\:return: An array where the first element is itself an array where each element is the detailed quality metric feedback for
the corresponding file. The second element is itself an array where each element is the feedback (true or false)
for whether the corresponding file passes all of the quality metrics

variables.name: staramr.results.AMRDetectionSummary.logger
documentation: Summarizes both ResFinder, PointFinder, and PlasmidFinder database results into a single table.

methods.name: staramr.results.AMRDetectionSummary.AMRDetectionSummary.__init__
documentation:
Constructs an object for summarizing AMR detection results.
\:param files: The list of genome files we have scanned against.
\:param resfinder_dataframe: The pd.DataFrame containing the ResFinder results.
\:param pointfinder_dataframe: The pd.DataFrame containing the PointFinder results.

methods.name: staramr.results.AMRDetectionSummary.AMRDetectionSummary.create_summary
documentation:
Constructs a summary pd.DataFrame for all ResFinder/PointFinder/PlasmidFinder results.
\:param include_negatives: If True, include files with no ResFinder/PointFinder/PlasmidFinder results.
\:return: A pd.DataFrame summarizing the results.

methods.name: staramr.tests.unit.results.test_QualityModule.QualityModuleTest.testNCExactlyUnacceptable
documentation: NCO=Number of contigs with length above minimum contig length	NCU=Number of contigs with length under minimum contig length	NC=Number of contigs whose length is exactly minimum contig length

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetectionFactory.AMRDetectionFactory.build
documentation:
Builds a new AMRDetection object.
\:param plasmidfinder_database: The staramr.blast.plasmidfinder.PlasmidfinderBlastDatabase to use for the particular PlasmidFinder database.
\:param resfinder_database: The staramr.blast.resfinder.ResfinderBlastDatabase for the particular ResFinder database.
\:param blast_handler: The staramr.blast.JobHandler to use for scheduling BLAST jobs.
\:param pointfinder_database: The staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase to use for the particular PointFinder database.
\:param include_negatives: If True, include files lacking AMR genes in the resulting summary table.
\:param include_resistances: If True, include predicted drug resistances in output.
\:param output_dir: The directory where output files are being written.
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.
\:param complex_mutations: An object mapping a set of multiple point mutations to a single phenotype.
\:return: A new AMRDetection object.

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetectionResistance.AMRDetectionResistance.__init__
documentation:
Builds a new AMRDetectionResistance.
\:param resfinder_database: The staramr.blast.resfinder.ResfinderBlastDatabase for the particular ResFinder database.
\:param arg_drug_table_resfinder: The staramr.databases.resistance.ARGDrugTable for searching for resfinder resistances.
\:param cge_drug_table_resfinder: The staramr.databases.resistance.CGEDrugTable for searching for resfinder resistances.
\:param amr_detection_handler: The staramr.blast.JobHandler to use for scheduling BLAST jobs.
\:param arg_drug_table_pointfinder: The staramr.databases.resistance.ARGDrugTable for searching for pointfinder resistances.
\:param pointfinder_database: The staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase to use for the particular PointFinder database.
\:param include_negative_results: If True, include files lacking AMR genes in the resulting summary table.
\:param output_dir: The directory where output fasta files are to be written into (None for no output fasta files).
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.
\:param complex_mutations: An object mapping a set of multiple point mutations to a single phenotype.

variables.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetection.logger
documentation: A Class to handle scanning files for AMR genes.

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetection.AMRDetection.__init__
documentation:
Builds a new AMRDetection object.
\:param resfinder_database: The staramr.blast.resfinder.ResfinderBlastDatabase for the particular ResFinder database.
\:param amr_detection_handler: The staramr.blast.JobHandler to use for scheduling BLAST jobs.
\:param pointfinder_database: The staramr.blast.pointfinder.PointfinderBlastDatabase to use for the particular PointFinder database.
\:param plasmidfinder_database: The staramr.blast.plasmidfinder.PlasmidfinderBlastDatabase for the particular PlasmidFinder database.
\:param include_negative_results: If True, include files lacking AMR genes in the resulting summary table.
\:param output_dir: The directory where output fasta files are to be written into (None for no output fasta files).
\:param genes_to_exclude: A list of gene IDs to exclude from the results.
\:param complex_mutations: An object mapping a set of multiple point mutations to a single phenotype.

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetection.AMRDetection.run_amr_detection
documentation:
Scans the passed files for AMR genes.
\:param files: The files to scan.
\:param pid_threshold: The percent identity threshold for BLAST results.
\:param plength_threshold_resfinder: The percent length overlap for BLAST results (resfinder).
\:param plength_threshold_pointfinder: The percent length overlap for BLAST results (pointfinder).
\:param plength_threshold_plasmidfinder: The percent length overlap for BLAST results (plasmidfinder).
\:param genome_size_lower_bound: The lower bound for the genome size as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param genome_size_upper_bound: The upper bound for the genome size as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param minimum_N50_value: The minimum N50 value as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param minimum_contig_length: The minimum contig length as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param unacceptable_num_contigs: The number of contigs in a file, equal to or above our minimum contig length, for which to raise a flag as defined by the user for quality metrics
\:param report_all: Whether or not to report all blast hits.
\:param ignore_invalid_files: Skips the invalid input files if set.
\:param mlst_scheme: Specifys scheme name MLST uses if set.
\:return: None

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetection.AMRDetection.get_mlst_results
documentation:
Gets a pd.DataFrame for the MLST results.
\:return: A pd.DataFrame for the MLST results.

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetection.AMRDetection.get_pointfinder_results

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetection.AMRDetection.get_plasmidfinder_results

Gets a pd.DataFrame for the PlasmidFinder results.

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetection.AMRDetection.get_summary_results

Gets a pd.DataFrame for a summary table of the results.

methods.name: staramr.detection.AMRDetection.AMRDetection.get_detailed_summary_results

Gets a pd.DataFrame for a detailed summary table of the results.

variables.name: staramr.databases.resistance.pointfinder.ARGDrugTablePointfinder.logger
documentation: A Class used to load up and search a file containing gene/drug mappings for PointFinder results.

methods.name: staramr.databases.resistance.pointfinder.ARGDrugTablePointfinder.ARGDrugTablePointfinder.__init__
documentation:
Builds a new ARGDrugTablePointfinder from the given file.
\:param file: The file containing the gene/drug mappings.

methods.name: staramr.databases.resistance.pointfinder.ARGDrugTablePointfinder.ARGDrugTablePointfinder.get_drug
documentation:
Gets the drug given the organism, gene, and position of point mutation.
\:param organism: The organism.
\:param gene: The gene.
\:param position: The position of the point mutation (may be codon position or nucleotide position depending on gene).
\:return: The drug this mutation causes resistance to, or None if no such drug.

methods.name: staramr.databases.resistance.pointfinder.complex.ComplexMutations.ComplexMutations.get_default_mutation_file
documentation:
Get the default file containing the list of complex mutations.
\:return: The default file containing the list of complex mutations.

variables.name: staramr.databases.resistance.resfinder.ARGDrugTableResfinder.logger
documentation: A Class used to load up and search a file containing gene/drug mappings for ResFinder results.

methods.name: staramr.databases.resistance.resfinder.ARGDrugTableResfinder.ARGDrugTableResfinder.__init__
documentation:
Builds a new ARGDrugTableResfinder from the given file.
\:param file: The file containing the gene/drug mappings.

methods.name: staramr.databases.resistance.resfinder.ARGDrugTableResfinder.ARGDrugTableResfinder.get_drug
documentation:
Gets the drug given the drug class, gene (plus variant of gene encoded in ResFinder database) and accession.
\:param drug_class: The drug class.
\:param gene_plus_variant: The gene plus variant (e.g., \{gene}\_\{variant} = \{blaIMP-58}\_\{1}).
\:param accession: The accession in the resfinder database (e.g., KU647281).
\:return: The particular drug, or None if no matching drug was found.

variables.name: staramr.databases.resistance.cge.CGEDrugTableResfinder.logger
documentation: A Class used to load up and search a file containing gene/drug mappings for CGE ResFinder results.

methods.name: staramr.databases.resistance.cge.CGEDrugTableResfinder.CGEDrugTableResfinder.__init__
documentation:
Builds a new CGEDrugTableResfinder from the given file.
\:param file: The file containing the gene/drug mappings.

methods.name: staramr.databases.resistance.cge.CGEDrugTableResfinder.CGEDrugTableResfinder.get_drug
documentation:
Gets the drug given the drug class, gene (plus variant of gene encoded in ResFinder database) and accession.
\:param drug_class: The drug class.
\:param gene_plus_variant: The gene plus variant (e.g., \{gene}\_\{variant} = \{blaIMP-58}\_\{1}).
\:param accession: The accession in the resfinder database (e.g., KU647281).
\:return: The particular drug, or None if no matching drug was found.

methods.name: staramr.databases.resistance.cge.CGEDrugTableResfinder.CGEDrugTableResfinder.get_cge_notes
documentation:
Gets the notes for a gene (plus variant of gene encoded in ResFinder database) and accession.
\:param gene_plus_variant: The gene plus variant (e.g., \{gene}\_\{variant} = \{blaIMP-58}\_\{1}).
\:param accession: The accession in the resfinder database (e.g., KU647281).
\:return: A string containtain the Notes, if they exist, or the empty string ("") if

> there are no Notes.

modules.name: staramr.databases.data.dist.pointfinder.INSTALL
documentation: !/usr/bin/python3

functions.name: staramr.databases.data.dist.pointfinder.INSTALL.eprint
documentation: This scripts installs the PointFinder database for using KMA
KMA should be installed before running this script
The scripts assumes that it is placed together with the PointFinder species
directories
First clone the repository:
git clone https://bitbucket.org/genomicepidemiology/pointfinder_db.git
Check if executable kma_index program is installed, if not promt the user for
path

functions.name: staramr.databases.data.dist.pointfinder.INSTALL.is_version_at_least
documentation: Works only if individual version numbers are less than 1000
